name: 7q31_2_CFTR_region
description: 7q31.2 region containing CFTR (cystic fibrosis transmembrane conductance regulator). CFTR itself is single-copy but flanked by small SDs and Alu-rich segments that mediate rare large CFTR deletions (e.g. CFTRdele2,3(21kb) Slavic founder allele) and complex CF alleles.

architecture.internal_structure: Alu-Alu pairs flanking CFTR exons mediate recurrent intragenic deletions; small SD blocks flanking the gene; classic Slavic CFTRdele2,3 21 kb deletion as recurrent breakpoint.

related_diseases: Congenital bilateral absence of vas deferens
